---
name: Topic idea / result share
about: Share a topic that worked especially well (or badly) with lafbot
title: '[topic] '
labels: topic-idea
assignees: ''
---

## Topic

The exact string you ran.

## How well did it work?

- [ ] Great — surfaced specific tactics I couldn't have found otherwise
- [ ] Okay — useful but generic
- [ ] Poor — vague, repetitive, or YouTube coverage was thin

## What made it work / not work?

Tell us about the source pool, the cluster quality, anomaly findings, anything notable.

## Sample finding worth sharing (optional)

The most surprising or useful single insight from your run.

## Would you share the sanitized output?

If yes, link to a public gist with the HTML or the `dataset.json`. Helps other users see what lafbot produces for that kind of topic.

## Why this matters

Topic ideas help us improve the pipeline:
- Topics that fail reveal gaps in the search query generator or extraction.
- Topics that surprise reveal patterns worth tuning the cluster architect for.
